review_notes: Silhouette gate asset: standing (frame 0) + seated_listen (frame 1), every body pixel soot_0. v002 rework changed interior skin fills only; silhouette geometry identical to v001. Card feature check: tallest/narrowest of cast, pure vertical stroke, small head 2-3 px forward on long neck, no hat, no bulk. C1 cross-cast distinctness to be verified when remaining five silhouettes exist.
